summary_en: 500,000 shares (0.74% S/O) to be acquired via ToSTNeT-3 on May 15, 2026 at ¥1,876/share (May 14 closing price); ¥1.0B authorization ceiling; settlement same day; authorization period May 15 – September 30, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Treasury Share Acquisition via Off-Hours Matching Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Maeda Kosen disclosed on May 14, 2026 that its board has authorized a specific block acquisition of treasury shares via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading. The company will submit an order on May 15, 2026 at the market opening (08:45 JST) to acquire up to 500,000 shares at ¥1,876 per share—the closing price from May 14. This block is part of a broader authorization approved the same day, which permits acquisition of the same 500,000 shares (0.74% of shares outstanding) for up to ¥1.0 billion over the period May 15 through September 30, 2026, using ToSTNeT-3 as the execution method. Results will be announced immediately after the morning trading window closes. The company notes that Chairman Maeda Seiritsu has advised his intention to sell his personal shareholding; this block acquisition aligns with the authorized program window.
